title: Dashboard Filter UI

posts.author: sharonr (Sharon R)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have dashboards shared with team members that are less familiar with Monday. It would be great to have more flexibility on creating easy to use dashboards.

  1. Text descriptions to tables to explain what is being filtered or shown in the table.
  2. Buttons/dropdowns that would allow for certain filters to be applied to the whole dashboard at once, instead of creating multiple dashboards or having the viewers have to go into the settings to change filters.

For example: adding a dropdown with saved filter presets so viewers can quickly jump between view 1 → view 2
Or adding a series of buttons for users who are less familiar with Monday who need to filter by only specific columns

Our use case:
I have a dashboard showing all projects and would like to add buttons/dropdowns to the dashboard UI that would allow viewers to quickly select the month they want to see, or the type of project they want to see, without having to navigate all of the other options
